section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a patient-reported symptom and duplicates HPI content; in Findings it could be misread as an exam observation, but context limits the impact.

section_miscategorizations.text: An EKG was performed and blood tests were performed.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This describes diagnostic tests as actions rather than their results; such orders/procedures typically belong in the Plan unless specific findings are reported.
